recommendations.title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens
recommendations.overview: Thirty years after defeating the Galactic Empire, Han Solo and his allies face a new threat from the evil Kylo Ren and his army of Stormtroopers.

recommendations.title: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker
recommendations.overview: The surviving Resistance faces the First Order once again as the journey of Rey, Finn and Poe Dameron continues. With the power and knowledge of generations behind them, the final battle begins.
